resources.string: Could not open the selected local file. It may have been moved or deleted.
Download server returned an error: HTTP %d
The selected ZIP file does not contain a valid Chrome OS recovery image (.bin).
Android denied permission to access the USB drive. Please replug the drive and grant permission.
The selected USB drive is not recognized as a standard Mass Storage device.
Could not claim the USB drive. Another app might be using it, or it is busy.
Hardware write error. The USB drive might be corrupted, full, or write-protected.
Hardware write error at the end of the drive. The USB drive might not be large enough.
Verification failed. The data written to the USB drive could not be read back correctly.
